description: Cross-sector baseline compliance controls for Togo v1. Designed to be applied together with sector-specific overlays. Rules are evidence-driven and deterministic; absence of evidence does not by itself constitute legal non-compliance.

metadata.scope: Togo-only baseline controls for document/document-set review. Applies alongside sector overlays where selected.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from Togolese and applicable regional legal/regulatory sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: Law No. 2019-014 relating to the protection of personal data
primary_sources.issuer: Togolese Republic / Personal Data Protection Authority (IPDCP)

primary_sources.name: Law No. 2018-026 on cybersecurity and the fight against cybercrime
National Cybersecurity Agency and CERT.tg official materials
BCEAO / WAEMU payment services and AML/CFT supervisory framework
primary_sources.issuer: Central Bank of West African States (BCEAO)

primary_sources.name: Public Health Code of the Togolese Republic, Law No. 2009-007

limitations: Rules encode document-evidence checks, not a final legal determination.
Each rule requires validation against current Togolese laws, regional WAEMU/OHADA/CIMA instruments, regulator circulars, directives, codes and guidance before production reliance.
Automated results are screening signals only and must be reviewed by qualified legal/compliance professionals.

rules.title: Privacy notice or personal-data protection evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks whether the document contains a privacy notice, personal-data notice, privacy policy, or equivalent disclosure.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Togolese legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law status, and legal sufficiency before relying on the automated result.
source_basis: Law No. 2019-014 relating to the protection of personal data

rules.title: Processing purpose, consent, or lawful-basis evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks whether the document states the purpose of processing and references consent, authorization, legal obligation, contract, or equivalent basis.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Togolese legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law status, and legal sufficiency before relying on the automated result.
source_basis: Law No. 2019-014 relating to the protection of personal data

rules.title: Cybersecurity, incident-response, or cyber-risk controls are documented
rules.summary: Checks for cybersecurity governance, incident handling, access control, or CERT/ANCy-related evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Togolese legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law status, and legal sufficiency before relying on the automated result.
source_basis: Law No. 2018-026 on cybersecurity and cybercrime

rules.title: AML/CFT/KYC evidence is present where financially relevant
rules.summary: Checks for anti-money-laundering, counter-terrorist-financing, KYC, due-diligence, or suspicious-transaction controls.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Togolese legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law status, and legal sufficiency before relying on the automated result.
source_basis: BCEAO/WAEMU AML/CFT and payment-services supervisory framework

rules.title: Consumer/client complaint and redress process evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for customer complaint handling, service disclosures, response timelines, or dispute-resolution routes.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Togolese legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law status, and legal sufficiency before relying on the automated result.
source_basis: General Togolese and WAEMU consumer/client-protection evidence routing

rules.title: Human review and evidence limitation language is present
rules.summary: Checks whether the reviewed material indicates responsible review, validation, approval, or sign-off where compliance conclusions are asserted.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Togolese legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law status, and legal sufficiency before relying on the automated result.
